title: Blast Rod
description: Adds a new Blast Rod block that breaks every movable block it is pushed into.
body:
# Blast Rod

This mod adds a single block, the **blast rod**, that breaks every movable block is pushed into.

A blast rod can only break blocks that a piston can move, and only if the direction it is pushed is the same as it is facing, that is the opposite of where the iron part is.

However, a blast rod doesn't need to be directly pushed by a piston, there may be other blocks from between the blast rod and the piston.

![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/hpMvqTF.png)

An overly complicated contraption to break a cobblestone block with a blast rod.

### Recipe

From up to bottom in a vertical line, two blaze rods and an iron ingot.

![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/k2ggBa4.png)

You can place the ingredients in any column of the 3x3 Crafting Table grid.

## Compatibility

This mod heavily edits the algorithm that calculates which blocks are pushed (or pulled) by a piston, and so it is incompatible with other mods that edit or interact with the same algorithm.

For instance, mods that change the number of blocks a piston can push (or pull).
